system.description:
The Majesty of Dragons is sought by many.

Enticing, elusive, exquisite.

LEVEL 3

Apodracosis. (1/encounter) Action: Unleash your draconic aspect, grating you 2xWIL+LVL temp HP and Draconic Powers. This transformation ends if you break Concentration or at the end of the encounter. Choose a damage type for your powers when you transform.

Fearsome Breath. (Draconic Power) Action: Spend X Mana to deal Xd6 damage of your chosen type in Cone 3. Half damage on a DEX save (DC 10+KEY). Applies Dragonmarked (counts as any condition for empowering spells, like Smoldering).

LEVEL 7

Peerless Intellect. (Draconic Power) Spells of your chosen type are automatically upcast 1 tier for free, and you may Concentrate on two activities at once.

Limitless Wrath. When you would break concentration, you don't (1/encounter).

LEVEL 11

Blinding Majesty. (Draconic Power) When you unleash your draconic aspect, all enemies within Reach 3 become Blinded until the end of their next turn, and gain Dragonmarked.

Glorious Wings. (Draconic Power) Gain a Fly speed.

LEVEL 15

Prodigious Vigor. The first time each encounter you would drop to 0 HP, set your HP to 1 instead and cast Apodracosis for free.
